TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_New_Zealand, title = New_Zealand, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Zealand} }

S.FORM: New Zealand, u kamu nu Sakizaya: Niw-Si-Lan u New zealand sa i labu nu usingyu , itiza i 41 00 S, 174 00 E. New Zealand i waliyu nu timulan nu subal a kanatal, tapang tusu u Uy-Lin-Dun , satabakiya a tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) a tukay. New Zealand tusa ku angangan nu subal, timulan atu amisan a subal, inatusaay a subal u Ku-Ke' a bayu ku laad, tapang tusu Uy-Lin-Dun i amis nu sadikuday a subal, mahini yadah hen ku adidi'ay nu subal. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 268,838 km2. ku ahebal nu lala' sa izaw ku 264,537 km2, u ahebal nu nanum sa izaw ku 4,301 km2. kakalukan a umah sa 43.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.40%, zuma henay a umah sa 25.40%. tabaki ku lala' nu New Zealand u pituay nu Taywan a kitidaan nu lala nuheni, pulung han sa tusa a bataan idaw ku 8 km2, nika celcel nu tademaw han hatida u Taywan nu 1/7. hamin nu tademaw sa 4,474,549. demiad kapah ku demiad nu New Zealand , takelal madimae ku liklik, kapah bangcal ku liklik, tanu aidangan sa. sapi' ku lalud caay ka hida u Taywan makaala tu 36‚ĄÉ ku caledes atu halemhem, kasienawan sa caay kahida u Taywan ku senget . . lala' itida i New Zealand taneng misinsin tu sakaudip atu pakunida sananay a maudip, taneng mikilim tu sakacaay kalecad nu sapitahawan a kawawan. bangcal sa ku New Zealand mahida uicudaday anikulitan, idaw ku silamalay nu buyu', yada i tungduh nu buyu' ku suleda, tabakiay nu banaw atu bangcalay nu bayubayuan a likenlikenana nu dadipasan. idaw ku pakunida sananay i hekal nu sapitahaway a aaidangan nu New Zealand , mitahaway nu singanganay a tademaw ci ci Ay-De-Mom Si-La-Li malecad mikayakay tu talakaway a buyuan, milabu tu nipihalebut nu pabuyan, migalasang atu taydan i talakaway nu pabawan makayda i tungduh tasasan kunipihalebut, hekal nu New Zealand tada u sakanamuhan nu tataydaan nu sakapahay a aaidangan. itini i tusa a malebut sabaw tu sepat a mihecaan pulung nu kanatal idaw ku nipihapu tu sapalekal tu nisausian a sasakamuen, saka pitu nu kitakid ku New Zealand . Śú®2014 7 šĹć. tapang tusu nu kanatal amisan nu New Zealand suotu u Wiy-lin-dun , itida i New Zealand saka amisan nu subalan a timulan. . u sakatusa nu New Zealand a tukayan, Sie-Li (ťõ™śĘ®, Sydney) atu Mue-E-Pen (ŚĘ®Áąĺśú¨, Melbourne) sakalecad u Da-Yang-Cuo a sakay teban nu lalangawan. katuud ku matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw itini mueneng atu misakawaw, yadah henay ku nalimaan a kafa atu atu salabi sananay a midangay nu tademaw. . kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad u enem a bulad tusa a demiad. satabakiay nu kanatal a tapang sakakaay nu tapang (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, mikayad tu demiad sa i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihca tusa a bulad enem a demiad. cunli u cunli nu New Zealand ayza ci Jacinda Ardern , mikayat a demiad i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a demiad. ÁīźŤ•ŅŤė≠ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮJacinda Ardern , ÁôĽŚüļśó•śúüśėĮ2017ŚĻī10śúą26śó• satabakiyay a tusu satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) nu kitidaan itida i nutimulan a taypinyung timul nu sasulitan 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, pangangan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kungan atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul tu a Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a New Zealand u New Zealand saka limulakay a kakitidaan, u nantaypinyang a angangan nu kakididaan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midang a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan u sakapahay nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipilian, Au-Ke-Lan u sakaliman nu sakapahay nu kitakitan.
S.PHON: n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand, u kamu nu sakizaja: niw-si-r~…ĺan u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand sa i r~…ĺabu nu usiŇčju , itiza i ** ** s, *** ** …ô. n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand i war~…ĺiju nu timur~…ĺan nu subar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ, tapaŇč tusu u uj-r~…ĺin-dun , satabakija a tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) a tukaj. n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tusa ku aŇčaŇčan nu subar~…ĺ, timur~…ĺan atu amisan a subar~…ĺ, inatusaaj a subar~…ĺ u ku-k…ô Ē~ ° a baju ku r~…ĺaad, tapaŇč tusu uj-r~…ĺin-dun i amis nu sadikudaj a subar~…ĺ, mańßini jadańß ńß…ôn ku adidi Ē~ °aj nu subar~…ĺ. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku ***,*** km*. ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanum sa izaw ku *,*** km*. kakar~…ĺukan a umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zuma ńß…ônaj a umańß sa **.**%. tabaki ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u pituaj nu tajwan a kitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa nuńß…ôni, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan sa tusa a bataan idaw ku * km*, nika ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw ńßan ńßatida u tajwan nu */*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa *,***,***. d…ômiad kapańß ku d…ômiad nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand , tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ madima…ô ku r~…ĺikr~…ĺik, kapańß baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺikr~…ĺik, tanu aidaŇčan sa. sapi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺud ¶aaj ka ńßida u tajwan makaar~…ĺa tu *** ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs atu ńßar~…ĺ…ômńß…ôm, kasi…ônawan sa ¶aaj kańßida u tajwan ku s…ôŇč…ôt . . r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° itida i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tan…ôŇč misinsin tu sakaudip atu pakunida sananaj a maudip, tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sapitańßawan a kawawan. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa ku n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand mańßida ui ¶udadaj anikur~…ĺitan, idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu buju Ē~ °, jada i tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ ° ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, tabakiaj nu banaw atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu bajubajuan a r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônana nu dadipasan. idaw ku pakunida sananaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sapitańßawaj a aaidaŇčan nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand , mitańßawaj nu siŇčaŇčanaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶i aj-d…ô-mom si-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mikajakaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a bujuan, mir~…ĺabu tu nipińßar~…ĺ…ôbut nu pabujan, migar~…ĺasaŇč atu tajdan i tar~…ĺakawaj nu pabawan makajda i tuŇčduńß tasasan kunipińßar~…ĺ…ôbut, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tada u sakanamuńßan nu tatajdaan nu sakapańßaj a aaidaŇčan. itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut sabaw tu s…ôpat a mińß…ô ¶aan pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku nipińßapu tu sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nisausian a sasakamu…ôn, saka pitu nu kitakid ku n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand . ***** * *. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ amisan nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand suotu u wij-r~…ĺin-dun , itida i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka amisan nu subar~…ĺan a timur~…ĺan. . u sakatusa nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand a tukajan, si…ô-r~…ĺi (**, sjdn…ô) atu mu…ô-…ô-p…ôn (***, m…ôr~…ĺbourn…ô) sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u da-jaŇč- ¶uo a sakaj t…ôban nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. katuud ku matin…ôŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč atu misakawaw, jadańß ńß…ônaj ku nar~…ĺimaan a kafa atu atu sar~…ĺabi sananaj a midaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. . kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad u …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad. satabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč sakakaaj nu tapaŇč ( ¶oŇč-tuŇč, **) ajza sa ¶i …ôr~…ĺizab…ôtńß ii, mikajad tu d…ômiad sa i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶a tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ¶unr~…ĺi u ¶unr~…ĺi nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand ajza ¶i *a ¶inda ard…ôrn , mikajat a d…ômiad i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ********a ¶inda ard…ôrn , **************** satabakijaj a tusu satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) nu kitidaan itida i nutimur~…ĺan a tajpinjuŇč timur~…ĺ nu sasur~…ĺitan ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇčan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ tu a uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a kakitidaan, u nantajpinjaŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu kakididaan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇč a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan u sakapańßaj nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipir~…ĺian, au-k…ô-r~…ĺan u sakar~…ĺiman nu sakapańßaj nu kitakitan.
S.FORM: New Zealand, u kamu nu Sakizaya: Niw-Si-Lan u New zealand sa i labu nu usingyu , itiza i 41 00 S, 174 00 E. New Zealand i waliyu nu timulan nu subal a kanatal, tapang tusu u Uy-Lin-Dun , satabakiya a tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) a tukay. New Zealand tusa ku angangan nu subal, timulan atu amisan a subal, inatusaay a subal u Ku-Ke' a bayu ku laad, tapang tusu Uy-Lin-Dun i amis nu sadikuday a subal, mahini yadah hen ku adidi'ay nu subal. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 268,838 km2. ku ahebal nu lala' sa izaw ku 264,537 km2, u ahebal nu nanum sa izaw ku 4,301 km2. kakalukan a umah sa 43.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.40%, zuma henay a umah sa 25.40%. tabaki ku lala' nu New Zealand u pituay nu Taywan a kitidaan nu lala nuheni, pulung han sa tusa a bataan idaw ku 8 km2, nika celcel nu tademaw han hatida u Taywan nu 1/7. hamin nu tademaw sa 4,474,549. demiad kapah ku demiad nu New Zealand , takelal madimae ku liklik, kapah bangcal ku liklik, tanu aidangan sa. sapi' ku lalud caay ka hida u Taywan makaala tu 36‚ĄÉ ku caledes atu halemhem, kasienawan sa caay kahida u Taywan ku senget . . lala' itida i New Zealand taneng misinsin tu sakaudip atu pakunida sananay a maudip, taneng mikilim tu sakacaay kalecad nu sapitahawan a kawawan. bangcal sa ku New Zealand mahida uicudaday anikulitan, idaw ku silamalay nu buyu', yada i tungduh nu buyu' ku suleda, tabakiay nu banaw atu bangcalay nu bayubayuan a likenlikenana nu dadipasan. idaw ku pakunida sananay i hekal nu sapitahaway a aaidangan nu New Zealand , mitahaway nu singanganay a tademaw ci ci Ay-De-Mom Si-La-Li malecad mikayakay tu talakaway a buyuan, milabu tu nipihalebut nu pabuyan, migalasang atu taydan i talakaway nu pabawan makayda i tungduh tasasan kunipihalebut, hekal nu New Zealand tada u sakanamuhan nu tataydaan nu sakapahay a aaidangan. itini i tusa a malebut sabaw tu sepat a mihecaan pulung nu kanatal idaw ku nipihapu tu sapalekal tu nisausian a sasakamuen, saka pitu nu kitakid ku New Zealand . Śú®2014 7 šĹć. tapang tusu nu kanatal amisan nu New Zealand suotu u Wiy-lin-dun , itida i New Zealand saka amisan nu subalan a timulan. . u sakatusa nu New Zealand a tukayan, Sie-Li (ťõ™śĘ®, Sydney) atu Mue-E-Pen (ŚĘ®Áąĺśú¨, Melbourne) sakalecad u Da-Yang-Cuo a sakay teban nu lalangawan. katuud ku matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw itini mueneng atu misakawaw, yadah henay ku nalimaan a kafa atu atu salabi sananay a midangay nu tademaw. . kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad u enem a bulad tusa a demiad. satabakiay nu kanatal a tapang sakakaay nu tapang (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, mikayad tu demiad sa i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihca tusa a bulad enem a demiad. cunli u cunli nu New Zealand ayza ci Jacinda Ardern , mikayat a demiad i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a demiad. ÁīźŤ•ŅŤė≠ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮJacinda Ardern , ÁôĽŚüļśó•śúüśėĮ2017ŚĻī10śúą26śó• satabakiyay a tusu satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) nu kitidaan itida i nutimulan a taypinyung timul nu sasulitan 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, pangangan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kungan atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul tu a Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a New Zealand u New Zealand saka limulakay a kakitidaan, u nantaypinyang a angangan nu kakididaan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midang a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan u sakapahay nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipilian, Au-Ke-Lan u sakaliman nu sakapahay nu kitakitan.

…ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad. satabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč sakakaaj nu tapaŇč ( ¶oŇč-tuŇč, **) ajza sa ¶i …ôr~…ĺizab…ôtńß ii, mikajad tu d…ômiad sa i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶a tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ¶unr~…ĺi u ¶unr~…ĺi nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand ajza ¶i *a ¶inda ard…ôrn , mikajat a d…ômiad i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ********a ¶inda ard…ôrn , **************** satabakijaj a tusu satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) nu kitidaan itida i nutimur~…ĺan a tajpinjuŇč timur~…ĺ nu sasur~…ĺitan ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇčan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ tu a uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a kakitidaan, u nantajpinjaŇč a aŇčaŇčan nu kakididaan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇč a kitidaan . . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan u sakapańßaj nu kitakid nu kitidaan ani pipir~…ĺian, au-k…ô-r~…ĺan u sakar~…ĺiman nu sakapańßaj nu kitakitan.
